subject: [PATCH 10/14] nfsd: add new netlink spec for svc_export upcall

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a new netlink specification for the svc_export upcall in the NFS daemon (nfsd). The new spec includes definitions for flags, attributes, and attribute sets related to NFS exports, such as cache types, export flags, and security modes. It also introduces new attribute sets for file system locations, authentication flavors, and service export requests. The patch modifies several files, including netlink specs, C code, and header files, to implement the new specification.
